name: NARRATIVE Ontology (Strategic Storytelling & Communication Patterns)
description: Strategic narrative arc structure (Context → Challenge → Choice → Commitment → Cadence), evidence-linked narrative sections, communication patterns (30-Sec Answer, Rented Brain, Ars Rhetorica, Fait Accompli, Dramatic Structure, Deconstruction, Scalable Business Machines), pattern selection logic, communication objectives, and cadenced lifecycle model. Bridges VSOM-SA analysis outputs to audience-ready strategic communication. Part of VE-Series VSOM-SC sub-series.

components.StrategicNarrative: Container for a full strategic narrative arc with five sections
components.NarrativeSection: One section of the narrative arc: Context, Challenge, Choice, Commitment, or Cadence
components.EvidenceChain: Ordered sequence of SA analysis references backing a narrative section
components.NarrativeVersion: Versioned snapshot of the narrative tied to a strategic review cycle
components.CommunicationPattern: Named verbal/persuasion pattern for strategic communication delivery
components.PatternSelection: Agent decision record: objective + audience + context → selected pattern
components.CommunicationObjective: Purpose category for a communication: Inform, Persuade, Mobilise, Sustain
components.CommunicationLifecycle: Cadenced communication rhythm: annual refresh, quarterly review, monthly pulse, event-driven alert

crossOntology.name: sectionEvidencedBySynthesis
crossOntology.purpose: Narrative sections backed by SA reasoning synthesis

crossOntology.name: lifecycleTriggeredByReview
crossOntology.purpose: Communication cadence tied to VSOM review cycle

crossOntology.name: narrativeSourcedFromDirection
crossOntology.purpose: Narrative content sourced from SA capstone direction summary

versionHistory.changes: Initial release — Strategic Narrative Arc, Communication Patterns, Pattern Selection, Communication Lifecycle

notes: Layer C1 (Narrative) of VSOM Strategy Communication. Foundation ontology for the SC sub-series. Bridges SA analysis outputs to structured communication via the 5-section narrative arc and 7 named communication patterns. CommunicationLifecycle ties to VSOM review cadence for sustained strategy communication.
